# Specs

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory holds implementation-level specs for active or recent work on ContentfulBundle.

## Format

Files are named `YYYY-MM-<description>.md`. Each spec should include:

- **Status**: Draft / In Progress / Done
- **Problem / Goal**: What is being built and why
- **Approach**: How it will be implemented
- **Open Questions**: Unresolved decisions

Shipped specs should be marked `Status: Done` rather than deleted — they serve as historical context.

## Current Specs

_No active specs at time of Golden Context seeding (2026-05-11). Add specs here when active work begins._
